metadata.title: THE INTENDED RELOCATION THROUGH THIS FILED MOTION AND FORMAL SERVICE AND ASK THE COURT TO DEEM THIS
metadata.case_header: THE INTENDED RELOCATION THROUGH THIS FILED MOTION AND FORMAL SERVICE AND ASK THE COURT TO DEEM THIS

procedural_facts: I am asking the judge to grant me permission to relocate my minor child, Violette M. Donatello, with me out of state effective June 15, 2026, and to modify the parenting schedule as needed for the move.
I cannot safely provide ordinary written notice to Petitioner outside of court.
The parties are the parents of the minor child, Violette M. Donatello, and are subject to a Judgment for Allocation of Parental Responsibilities entered August 3, 2022, under which.

Deem notice by filing and formal service sufficient under the circumstances, or excuse strict compliance with the 60day written notice requirement because of the emergency Order of Protection and the short timeline before the move.

Protect the confidentiality of my new residential address and permit disclosure only as the Court may order (to the Court, the Guardian ad Litem, and any court approved supervisors), rather than directly to Petitioner.

claims.text: I am asking the judge to grant me permission to relocate my minor child, Violette M. Donatello, with me out of state effective June 15, 2026, and to modify the parenting schedule as needed for the move.
claims.body: I am asking the judge to grant me permission to relocate my minor child, Violette M. Donatello, with me out of state effective June 15, 2026, and to modify the parenting schedule as needed for the move.

claims.text: The relocation is more than 25 miles from our current home and out of Illinois, so it is a relocation under 750 ILCS 5/600(g) and 750 ILCS 5/609.2.
claims.body: The relocation is more than 25 miles from our current home and out of Illinois, so it is a relocation under 750 ILCS 5/600(g) and 750 ILCS 5/609.2.

claims.text: There is currently an emergency Order of Protection in place protecting me and Violette from Petitioner, with a return date of May 1, 2026, and the Order of Protection.
claims.body: There is currently an emergency Order of Protection in place protecting me and Violette from Petitioner, with a return date of May 1, 2026, and the Order of Protection.

claims.text: I expect to be consolidated into this family case.
claims.body: I expect to be consolidated into this family case.

claims.text: Because the emergency Order of Protection restricts direct contact and communication.
claims.body: Because the emergency Order of Protection restricts direct contact and communication.

claims.text: I cannot safely provide ordinary written notice to Petitioner outside of court.
claims.body: I cannot safely provide ordinary written notice to Petitioner outside of court.

claims.text: I am asking the Court to approve relocation, protect my new address from disclosure to Petitioner, modify the parenting schedule in Violettes best interests, and coordinate any relocation orders with existing and requested parenting time restrictions needed for her safety and mental health.
claims.body: I am asking the Court to approve relocation, protect my new address from disclosure to Petitioner, modify the parenting schedule in Violettes best interests, and coordinate any relocation orders with existing and requested parenting time restrictions needed for her safety and mental health.

claims.text: Background and Reasons for Relocation.
claims.body: Background and Reasons for Relocation.

claims.text: The parties are the parents of the minor child, Violette M. Donatello, and are subject to a Judgment for Allocation of Parental Responsibilities entered August 3, 2022, under which.
claims.body: The parties are the parents of the minor child, Violette M. Donatello, and are subject to a Judgment for Allocation of Parental Responsibilities entered August 3, 2022, under which.

claims.text: I currently reside in DeKalb, Illinois.
claims.body: I currently reside in DeKalb, Illinois.

claims.text: I seek permission to relocate Violette with me out of state effective June 15, 2026.
claims.body: I seek permission to relocate Violette with me out of state effective June 15, 2026.

claims.text: The relocation is more than 25 miles from my current residence and outside Illinois, which makes it a relocation under 750 ILCS 5/600(g) and 750 ILCS 5/609.2.
claims.body: The relocation is more than 25 miles from my current residence and outside Illinois, which makes it a relocation under 750 ILCS 5/600(g) and 750 ILCS 5/609.2.

claims.text: After our family lost housing in Kane county, my husband and.
claims.body: After our family lost housing in Kane county, my husband and.

claims.text: I were living in an RV outside of town beginning around July 2024, because the Allocation Judgment defaulted the childrens school to Petitioners address.
claims.body: I were living in an RV outside of town beginning around July 2024, because the Allocation Judgment defaulted the childrens school to Petitioners address.

claims.text: I was trying to follow the rules and in good faith in our co- parenting structure, and under the belief that living in his apartment would be in their best interest.
claims.body: I was trying to follow the rules and in good faith in our co- parenting structure, and under the belief that living in his apartment would be in their best interest.

claims.text: I allowed both children to stay with Petitioner while we tried to secure housing in the area.
claims.body: I allowed both children to stay with Petitioner while we tried to secure housing in the area.

claims.text: I spent part of each week at the RV caring for my husband, who has cirrhosis and is medically fragile, and part of each week on Petitioners couch so that.
claims.body: I spent part of each week at the RV caring for my husband, who has cirrhosis and is medically fragile, and part of each week on Petitioners couch so that.

claims.text: I could be near the children.
claims.body: I could be near the children.

claims.text: When the weather became colder and my husbands medical condition worsened.
claims.body: When the weather became colder and my husbands medical condition worsened.

claims.text: I had to stay with him more frequently to prevent him from freezing or having a medical crisis.
claims.body: I had to stay with him more frequently to prevent him from freezing or having a medical crisis.

claims.text: After Thanksgiving 2024, at the beginning of December Petitioner abruptly kicked the children out of his home as a show of control, telling them to enjoy freezing with your mom, under the pretext that.
claims.body: After Thanksgiving 2024, at the beginning of December Petitioner abruptly kicked the children out of his home as a show of control, telling them to enjoy freezing with your mom, under the pretext that.

claims.text: I would not denounce the pope, an allegiance.
claims.body: I would not denounce the pope, an allegiance.

claims.text: I do not even hold.
claims.body: I do not even hold.

claims.text: I obtained an Order of Protection in December 2024 so that.
claims.body: I obtained an Order of Protection in December 2024 so that.

claims.text: I could safely remove the children from Petitioners home, retrieve their belongings, and stabilize them without further confrontation.
claims.body: I could safely remove the children from Petitioners home, retrieve their belongings, and stabilize them without further confrontation.

claims.text: That was over christmas Break of 2024, the children stayed with my mother while we moved everything out and secured suitable housing.
claims.body: That was over christmas Break of 2024, the children stayed with my mother while we moved everything out and secured suitable housing.

claims.text: Pauletta Donatello Despite these efforts, our housing situation in this school district remains unstable.
claims.body: Pauletta Donatello Despite these efforts, our housing situation in this school district remains unstable.

claims.text: The current landlord allowed us to occupy an uninhabited unit temporarily but has now listed the property for sale, advised that he cannot justify the expense or complete necessary structural repairs, and asked us to vacate at the end of the school year.
claims.body: The current landlord allowed us to occupy an uninhabited unit temporarily but has now listed the property for sale, advised that he cannot justify the expense or complete necessary structural repairs, and asked us to vacate at the end of the school year.

claims.text: I have been unable to secure comparable safe, affordable housing in this district.
claims.body: I have been unable to secure comparable safe, affordable housing in this district.

claims.text: Violettes recent psychiatric crisis is central to this request.
claims.body: Violettes recent psychiatric crisis is central to this request.

claims.text: In late March 2026, Petitioner sent Violette a series of extremely disturbing text messages, including telling her she "should have been aborted", that she is a "piece of shit and a turd that should have been flushed", and that she would be ejected out to the world in shame, and telling her to "GET THE FUCK OUT OF MY TOWN".
claims.body: In late March 2026, Petitioner sent Violette a series of extremely disturbing text messages, including telling her she "should have been aborted", that she is a "piece of shit and a turd that should have been flushed", and that she would be ejected out to the world in shame, and telling her to "GET THE FUCK OUT OF MY TOWN".

claims.text: This was not the first series of messages like this that she recieved.
claims.body: This was not the first series of messages like this that she recieved.

claims.text: The school counselor and school police liaison contacted me about these messages and encouraged me to report them and seek protection.
claims.body: The school counselor and school police liaison contacted me about these messages and encouraged me to report them and seek protection.

claims.text: I filed Police Report No.
claims.body: I filed Police Report No.

claims.text: 26- 02221, then, after learning that Violette was having suicidal thoughts.
claims.body: 26- 02221, then, after learning that Violette was having suicidal thoughts.

claims.text: I obtained an emergency Order of Protection on April 10, 2026, and that same day arranged for her to be admitted to inpatient psychiatric treatment for suicidal ideation.
claims.body: I obtained an emergency Order of Protection on April 10, 2026, and that same day arranged for her to be admitted to inpatient psychiatric treatment for suicidal ideation.

claims.text: She has since been discharged from inpatient care but remains in intensive outpatient treatment and ongoing mental health care, structured with the option of virtual participation to accommodate our transition.
claims.body: She has since been discharged from inpatient care but remains in intensive outpatient treatment and ongoing mental health care, structured with the option of virtual participation to accommodate our transition.

claims.text: Relocation with me will place Violette in a safer, more stable environment with her immediate family and extended-family support while she recovers from this crisis.
claims.body: Relocation with me will place Violette in a safer, more stable environment with her immediate family and extended-family support while she recovers from this crisis.

claims.text: It will also reduce her exposure to Petitioners unpredictable and abusive behavior and allow her to receive consistent care in a setting that is not overshadowed by his presence and threats.
claims.body: It will also reduce her exposure to Petitioners unpredictable and abusive behavior and allow her to receive consistent care in a setting that is not overshadowed by his presence and threats.

claims.text: Pauletta Donatello 2.LegalBasisandRequestforRelief ThiscasearisesundertheIllinoisParentageActof2015,andissuesofparentingtimeandrelocationare governedbyPartVIoftheIllinoisMarriageandDissolutionofMarriageAct,including750ILCS5/602.7 (bestinterestsofthechild)and750ILCS5/609.2(relocation).Under750ILCS5/609.2,theCourt considers,amongotherthings,thecircumstancesandreasonsfortheintendedrelocation;thereasonsa parentisobjecting;thehistoryandqualityofeachparentsrelationshipwiththechild;educational opportunitiesandextendedfamilyatthecurrentandproposedlocations;theanticipatedimpactof relocationonthechild;andtheCourtsabilitytofashionareasonableallocationofparental responsibilitiesandparentingtimewhileminimizingimpairmenttotheparentchildrelationshipcausedby relocation.
claims.body: Pauletta Donatello 2.LegalBasisandRequestforRelief ThiscasearisesundertheIllinoisParentageActof2015,andissuesofparentingtimeandrelocationare governedbyPartVIoftheIllinoisMarriageandDissolutionofMarriageAct,including750ILCS5/602.7 (bestinterestsofthechild)and750ILCS5/609.2(relocation).Under750ILCS5/609.2,theCourt considers,amongotherthings,thecircumstancesandreasonsfortheintendedrelocation;thereasonsa parentisobjecting;thehistoryandqualityofeachparentsrelationshipwiththechild;educational opportunitiesandextendedfamilyatthecurrentandproposedlocations;theanticipatedimpactof relocationonthechild;andtheCourtsabilitytofashionareasonableallocationofparental responsibilitiesandparentingtimewhileminimizingimpairmenttotheparentchildrelationshipcausedby relocation.

claims.text: Pauletta Donatello WHEREFORE, I respectfully request that this Court: 1.
claims.body: Pauletta Donatello WHEREFORE, I respectfully request that this Court: 1.

claims.text: Grant me permission to relocate the minor child, Violette M. Donatello, out of state effective June 15, 2026, pursuant to 750 ILCS 5/609.2.
claims.body: Grant me permission to relocate the minor child, Violette M. Donatello, out of state effective June 15, 2026, pursuant to 750 ILCS 5/609.2.

claims.text: Deem notice by filing and formal service sufficient under the circumstances, or excuse strict compliance with the 60day written notice requirement because of the emergency Order of Protection and the short timeline before the move.
claims.body: Deem notice by filing and formal service sufficient under the circumstances, or excuse strict compliance with the 60day written notice requirement because of the emergency Order of Protection and the short timeline before the move.

claims.text: Protect the confidentiality of my new residential address and permit disclosure only as the Court may order (to the Court, the Guardian ad Litem, and any court approved supervisors), rather than directly to Petitioner.
claims.body: Protect the confidentiality of my new residential address and permit disclosure only as the Court may order (to the Court, the Guardian ad Litem, and any court approved supervisors), rather than directly to Petitioner.

claims.text: Modify the parenting schedule and any related allocation provisions as necessary to accommodate relocation and to protect Violettes best interests, consistent with any parenting time restrictions the Court enters under 750 ILCS 5/603.10.
claims.body: Modify the parenting schedule and any related allocation provisions as necessary to accommodate relocation and to protect Violettes best interests, consistent with any parenting time restrictions the Court enters under 750 ILCS 5/603.10.

claims.text: Enter any additional orders needed to coordinate relocation with existing and requested parenting time restrictions and to protect Violettes safety, mental health, and stability.
claims.body: Enter any additional orders needed to coordinate relocation with existing and requested parenting time restrictions and to protect Violettes safety, mental health, and stability.

claims.text: Grant any other and further relief the Court deems just and proper.
claims.body: Grant any other and further relief the Court deems just and proper.
